description_long: This is an adult male figure standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve shirt and long pants, both of which appear to be casual and unadorned. The figure has a stocky build, with a round face and short hair, and is wearing closed-toe shoes. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a simple, everyday urban style. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, with minimal reflectivity. The overall appearance is realistic, suitable for representing a typical pedestrian in an urban environment.
description: A stocky adult male in casual fitted clothing, standing upright with arms outstretched. He has short hair and wears closed-toe shoes, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full arm span in a T-pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and facial outline.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and long pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
